meaning: adj.生产前的 试制的,试生产的,预制造的
examples: Requirements identified with this process will be the base for the scenarios of the preproduction Test.
Always consider using a dedicated preproduction environment to test changes before going live with them.
The Sweeney preproduction team was headquartered at Pinewood Studios, near London, where Burton now lives.
Preproduction units will be released for public tests in October, followed by mass production.
These preproduction models from Samsung were feather-light, with a slightly smaller screen than the standard PalmPilot size.
